title: Add prefix syntax error checking, and improve docs
body:
Version <= git master 
OS <= windows 11
cmake <= 3.23.0.rc5

I have several issues with the verilate command in cmake:

The primary model header is named after the first source in the `SOURCES` list. This is inintuitive, when the toplevel is not defined first.
The solution would be, to first identify the toplevel (optionally all toplevels) and then generate header files for each toplevel.
When `TOP_MODULE` is defined, use that identifier.

The PREFIX option causes compilation errors on windows, when `".."` as path is used. The cause is that somehow classes in header and sourcefiles are named `class ..`, note the two dots. This is a forbidden char for identifiers in C++.
The solution to this, would be to get the canonical path and use the foldername. Also prepend some characters like `ver_` and replace forbidden chars with `_`.
